creator: evantdster@gmail.com
text:
The version of audio/rosegarden in the ports tree is ancient. According to http://www.rosegardenmusic.com/getting/ it seems to no longer be maintained (it's the one at the bottom of the page), and new project (at the top of the page) has made it obsolete. Since the new version has a lower version number, it might be advisable to move the old version or something. I may give a shot to updating it, and of course I'll add any findings here.

How-To-Repeat: Install audio/rosegarden and/or see http://www.rosegardenmusic.com/getting/
